steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Subtract 61 from both sides of the equation:
$$|p| + 61 = 65$$
$$|p| = 65 - 61 = 4$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content: The absolute value equation $|p| = 4$ has two solutions: $p = 4$ and $p = -4$. Looking at the answer choices, only 4 appears as an option. That matches choice B — B is correct.
